photos.title: Château de la Tourette (1935), Éveux sur L’Arbresle (Rhône).jpg
photos.description: The owner, in 1576, was Alexandre Seigneur de la Tourette. From the end of the 16th century to the beginning of the 17th century, the central part was built. In the 18th century, the rear part and the right part with the tower. It was sold in 1943 by the Countess of Villiers to the real estate company Tourette (Order of Saint-Dominique), who later commissioned Le Corbusier to build the convent of Sainte-Marie de la Tourette, next door.
photos.author: Unbekannte Fotograf
